title: wholesale_villager
description:
随着交易次数越多村民交易的价格越便宜 同时无限交易
As the number of transactions increases, the prices of villagers' transactions become cheaper and unlimited transactions are made
body:
批发村民是一个方便原版生存的 Mod 随着交易次数越多村民交易的价格越便宜 同时无限交易（可在配置修改） 

当价格为1时，则交换的物品数增加（可在配置修改）

配置均可修改

English description:

Wholesale Villagers is a mod that facilitates the survival of the original version. As the number of transactions increases, the price of village transactions becomes cheaper and unlimited transactions can be made (which can be modified in the configuration)


When the price is 1, the number of exchanged items increases (can be modified in the configuration)


Configuration can be modified
